title: Failed job diagnosis
query_text: Why did my job fail yesterday?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Job 891234 (molecular_dynamics_run42) failed due to an out-of-memory (OOM) kill on node01. The lammps process was killed by the kernel OOM handler at 01:47 UTC on 2026-02-10. The job requested 64 GB RAM but consumed 64023 MB (~64.1 GB), slightly exceeding its allocation. The slurm reason code is OOMKilled and the stderr confirms 1 oom_kill event in StepId=891234.batch.
